description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a hooded jacket with a front zipper and large pockets, paired with cargo pants. The jacket appears thick and insulated, suitable for cooler weather, and the hood is worn up, partially covering the head. The figure's arms are extended outward, and the hands are open and relaxed. The footwear consists of high-top sneakers with visible laces and thick soles, adding to the streetwear aesthetic. The face is partially visible beneath the hood, and the hair is styled in short, defined waves. The overall appearance suggests a modern, streetwise pedestrian commonly seen in city environments.
description: Urban adult male in a hooded jacket, cargo pants, and high-top sneakers with arms outstretched. The figure has short, wavy hair and a relaxed, casual posture.
description_view_0: Viewed from below the feet, the soles of the sneakers and the outstretched arms are prominent, with the hooded head visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view showing the profile of the hooded head, the thickness of the jacket, and the relaxed position of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the hooded head, outstretched arms, and the overall symmetry of the body and clothing.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the hood, jacket bulk, and the relaxed, supine posture.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded jacket with front zipper and large pockets, cargo pants, and high-top sneakers
